descFull: 🍒 Cherry — Go game server framework powered by Actor Model. Serial goroutine per actor, NATS/etcd discovery, pluggable connectors (TCP/WS/HTTP), protobuf & object-pooled messaging,  time wheel, snowflake. Born for MMO/SLG/RPG, scales to millions.
